query:
SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  url,
  consecutiveErrors,
  errorCount,
  lastError,
  lastErrorAt,
  lastFetchedAt,
  quarantined,
  active
FROM rssSources
WHERE consecutiveErrors >= 3
   OR (errorCount > 5 AND (lastFetchedAt IS NULL OR lastFetchedAt < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)))
ORDER BY consecutiveErrors DESC, errorCount DESC
LIMIT 20;
